description: Carry your essentials to office in style with this messenger bag from timberland. Show off your support for conservation of nature and encourage others to join in. Made from organic fabrics, this messenger bag from timberland speaks volumes of your eco-friendly personality.Made of aniline leather to lend it a rugged look and help reduce environment impact Water resistantOne internal organiser pocketTwo external organiser pockets with two side chambersPadded shoulder strap for easy carryExternal sleeve on the back to carry the bag in your handsSnap closures for a tight FitCare  Do not machine wash  Rub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirt
